data.title: DASH partners with ABM to install pantograph charger for EV buses in Alexandria, marking key step in fleet electrification.
data.description: The installation of a pantograph charger and essential electrical infrastructure by ABM signifies a significant achievement in DASH's plan to electrify its fleet. This development serves as a pivotal milestone, showcasing progress towards transitioning to electric vehicles. This initiative underscores DASH's commitment to sustainable practices and reducing carbon emissions. The incorporation of these components lays the groundwork for enhancing the operational efficiency and sustainability of DASH's fleet. This strategic move by ABM represents a crucial step towards fulfilling DASH's goal of electrifying their fleet, with the potential to significantly impact the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions and promote environmental conservation.

data.title: PowerHouse Data Centers signs hyperscale lease at PowerHouse Arcola in Northern Virginia for AI and cloud expansion. Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: In a recent agreement, PowerHouse Arcola has solidified its position as a vital growth center for AI and cloud infrastructure. Based in McLean, Virginia, this collaboration announced on January 15, 2026, signifies a significant step forward for PowerHouse Data Centers, a prominent developer of advanced hyperscale data centers and a branch of American Real Estate Group. The agreement underscores the escalating importance of Arcola as a strategic hub for technological advancements, paving the way for cutting-edge developments in the field.

data.title: Rio Tinto and BHP partnership to access 200 million tonnes of iron ore in Pilbara with joint developments.
data.description: Rio Tinto Plc announced on Wednesday a partnership with BHP Group Limited to extract up to 200 million tonnes of iron ore from their Yandicoogina and Yandi operations in the Pilbara region. The collaboration involves two non-binding memorandum of understanding (MOUs), focusing on joint development of Rio Tinto's Wunbye deposit and arrangements for BHP to provide ore from its Yandi Lower Channel Deposit. This strategic alliance between the two mining giants could significantly impact the iron ore market. For more information, visit a financial news website.

data.title: Screen Skinz to appear on ABC's Shark Tank on Jan 21, introducing custom screen protectors. 15, 2026, PRNewswire.
data.description: On January 21, Screen Skinz will be showcased nationally as the leadership team unveils the latest advancement in personalized mobile protection. Based in Houston, Screen Skinz is the world's sole print on-demand screen protector, highlighting unique designs. Set to revolutionize the industry, the product will make its debut with its innovative features and wide customization range. Stay tuned to witness the unveiling of this groundbreaking product.

data.title: Fed's Kashkari optimistic about US economy, expects sustained growth and easing inflation. Inflation still 'too high', but moving in 'right direction'.
data.description: Neel Kashkari, President of the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis, expressed positivity regarding the U.S. economy's future, predicting sustained growth and a reduction in inflation. Speaking at a virtual town hall with the Wisconsin Bankers Association, Kashkari noted that although inflation remains "too high," it is heading in the right direction. He specifically highlighted expectations for a decline in inflation within housing-related sectors. Kashkari was uncertain about whether inflation would reach two and a half percent by the year's end or fall short of or exceed that figure. Stressing the Fed's dedication to its 2% inflation target, the Minneapolis Fed president did not foresee...

data.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust declares quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share ($1.12 annually) for SEVN common shareholders. (295)
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Seven Hills Realty Trust declared a regular cash distribution of $0.28 per share ($1.12 annually) for its common shares (Nasdaq: SEVN). Shareholders of record by January 26, 2026, will receive the distribution around February 19, 2026. Seven Hills Realty Trust, a real estate investment trust, focuses on originating and managing properties.

data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) declares $0.05 quarterly dividend per share ($0.20 annually).
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT), made a public statement about a quarterly cash distribution for its common shareholders. The distribution amounts to $0.05 per share, which translates to an annual distribution of $0.20 per share. Shareholders recorded as of January 26, 2026, will receive this distribution, which is expected to be paid around February 19, 2026. ILPT primarily concentrates on owning and leasing superior quality industrial properties.

data.title: Diversified Healthcare Trust declares $0.01 quarterly dividend ($0.04 yearly) on common shares.
data.description: Diversified Healthcare Trust (Nasdaq: DHC) based in Newton, Mass., revealed a regular quarterly cash distribution of $0.01 per common share ($0.04 annually). The distribution is slated to be paid to DHC's common shareholders recorded as of January 26, 2026, with distribution expected around February 19, 2026. DHC is a real estate investment trust specializing in owning top-tier healthcare properties.

data.title: Westmount Realty Capital acquires 809,138 sq ft industrial portfolio in Sparks, NV, expanding their Western U.S. footprint.
data.description: In Sparks, Nevada, Westmount Realty Capital, a prominent private real estate investment firm focusing on commercial and multifamily properties, has purchased the Lillard Drive Industrial portfolio. This portfolio consists of three Class A industrial buildings, totaling 809,138 square feet. Sparks, known for being a major logistics and distribution hub in the U.S., serves as the location for this acquisition. This move adds to Westmount's expanding industrial portfolio in the Western U.S.
Estonian Foreign Minister: We are contributing to the planning of European military exercises in Greenland and are ready to send troops if asked to do so

data.title: TRP Infrastructure Services buys Striping Technology, a Texas-based company. Arlington Capital Partners oversees TRP.
data.description: TRP Infrastructure Services, a prominent national provider of roadway pavement marking and traffic control solutions based in Fort Worth, Texas, has recently acquired Striping Technology, L.P., a company specializing in pavement marking services located in Tyler, Texas. This acquisition strengthens TRP's presence in the East Texas region. TRP is backed by Arlington Capital Partners, a private investment firm in the Washington, D.C. area. Striping Technology's expertise will complement TRP's services, enhancing their offerings in critical infrastructure maintenance. This strategic move reflects TRP's commitment to expanding its operations, now covering a broader geographic area and serving a larger customer base.

data.title: Bankwell Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: BWFG) to release Q4 earnings on Jan 29, 2026, with a call at 11:00 am Eastern Time.
data.description: Bankwell Financial Group, Inc., the parent company of Bankwell Bank, will be releasing its earnings report for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, on January 29, 2026. This announcement was made in New Canaan, Conn. Bankwell Financial Group, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BWFG. The management team will be hosting an audio webcast and conference call at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the company's financial results. The webcast link and presentation details will be provided alongside the earnings release.

data.title: VENU appoints Vic Sutter as COO to enhance operational efficiency and enterprise oversight as it expands nationwide.
data.description: In Colorado Springs, Venu Holding Corporation (NYSE American: VENU), known for its premium live entertainment venues, has made executive leadership changes to boost operational efficiency as the company expands nationwide. Vic Sutter, previously the Executive Vice President of Operations, is now the Chief Operating Officer. This move aims to align operations as the company grows, with a focus on overseeing VENU's expanding portfolio.

data.title: Vantage Data Centers secures £254M through existing £200M A-2 Notes tap and new £54M B Tranche, following debut issuance of £600M in EMEA data center ABS.
data.description: Vantage Data Centers, a prominent global hyperscale data center campuses provider, has successfully secured an additional £254 million in securitized term notes. The funding consists of £200 million from tapping the existing Class A-2 Notes and £54 million from the new Class B Tranche. This financial achievement follows Vantage's inaugural public issuance in 2024, which raised £600 million. Notably, this issuance marked the first-ever EMEA data center ABS completed in sterling. The Class A-2 Note is a significant component of this successful fundraising endeavor.

data.title: B&G Foods to acquire College Inn and Kitchen Basics brands for $110 million in cash.
data.description: In Parsippany, New Jersey, B&G Foods, Inc. (NYSE: BGS) disclosed its plan to purchase the broth and stock business of Del Monte Foods Corporation II Inc. and related brands such as College Inn and Kitchen Basics. The agreement involves a cash transaction totaling around $110 million, with the final amount subject to adjustment based on inventory at the time of closing, in addition to taking on specific liabilities. B&G Foods emerged as the successful bidder for this business segment after a competitive auction process.

data.title: Tanger (NYSE: SKT) declares $0.2925 per share dividend, payable on 2/13/26 to common shareholders as of 1/30/26.
data.description: Greensboro, North Carolina - Tanger® (NYSE: SKT), a prominent owner and operator of outlet and open-air retail shopping destinations, recently disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2925 per share. The dividend will be disbursed on February 13, 2026, to common shareholders of record as of January 30, 2026. Tanger Inc. (NYSE: SKT) boasts over 44 years of experience in the retail and outlet industry, solidifying its position as a key player in the market.

data.title: Perfect Corp. unveils 9 new APIs for fashion virtual try-ons, expanding capabilities for bracelets, rings, shoes, and more.
data.description: Perfect Corp. unveils the debut of nine new APIs in its Fashion API lineup in New York. These APIs offer virtual try-on options for various accessories like watches, bracelets, rings, earrings, necklaces, scarves, hats, shoes, and bags. The move aims to enrich Perfect Corp.'s fashion API collection and empower brands to provide enhanced, personalized, and conversion-focused digital experiences.
